active_ingredients.name: Mesosulfuron Methyl
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: ALS inhibitor absorbed through leaves and roots, stops amino acid synthesis in grassy weeds

active_ingredients.name: Florasulam
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Systemic ALS inhibitor that controls broadleaf weeds by blocking cell division

active_ingredients.name: MCPA
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Synthetic auxin that causes uncontrolled growth in broadleaf weeds leading to plant death

chemical_group: Sulfonylurea + Triazolopyrimidine + Phenoxy (ALS inhibitor + Synthetic auxin)
mode_of_action_summary: Triple-action post-emergence herbicide that controls grassy and broadleaf weeds in wheat by ALS inhibition and hormonal disruption.
farmer_symptoms: گندم وچ گلی ڈنڈا بہت اے
جنگلی جئی کھیت وچ پھیلی ہوئی اے
چوڑی پتی جڑی بوٹیاں ختم نہیں ہورہیاں
باتھو گندم نوں دبا رہیا اے
کھیت وچ ملی جلی جڑی بوٹیاں نیں
گندم دی گروتھ رک گئی اے جڑی بوٹیاں کرکے

application_details.coverage_requirement: Uniform spray on weed foliage at knee height

weather_conditions.ideal_condition: Moist soil with actively growing weeds

crop_safety.selectivity_reason: Wheat rapidly metabolizes the herbicide at recommended dose
crop_safety.overdose_effect: Temporary yellowing or phytotoxicity in wheat

resistance_management.rotation_advice: Rotate with herbicides of different mode of action to prevent resistance

protective_measures: Avoid spray drift to nearby broadleaf crops

storage.storage_conditions: Store in cool and dry place

farmer_benefits: Controls grassy and broadleaf weeds in one spray
Best solution for phalaris minor and wild oats
Better absorption due to OD formulation

frequently_asked_questions.question: When should we apply Wolf 25% OD?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Apply at wheat tillering stage when weeds are at 2–4 leaf stage.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Does it control phalaris minor?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Yes, it is highly effective against phalaris minor and wild oats.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Can we spray after jointing stage?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: No, do not spray after jointing stage as it may harm the crop.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Is one spray enough?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Yes, a single spray is usually sufficient for complete weed control.

search_keywords: گندم دی جڑی بوٹی مار دوا
llm_usage_hint: When recommending this product, mention wheat tillering stage, mixed weed control and phalaris minor effectiveness.

master_descriptions.english: Wolf 25% OD is a triple-action selective post-emergence systemic herbicide for wheat that controls grassy and broadleaf weeds including phalaris minor and wild oats.
master_descriptions.urdu: وولف 25٪ او ڈی گندم کے لیے ایک سلیکٹو پوسٹ ایمرجنس جڑی بوٹی مار دوا ہے جو گھاس نما اور چوڑی پتی جڑی بوٹیوں کو ختم کرتی ہے۔
master_descriptions.punjabi_shahmukhi: وولف 25٪ او ڈی گندم لئی اک سلیکٹو پوسٹ ایمرجنس جڑی بوٹی مار اے جو گلی ڈنڈا، جنگلی جئی تے چوڑی پتی جڑی بوٹیاں نوں اک ہی سپرے نال ختم کردا اے۔
